testcase.name: testUserLoginValidationFailure

testcase.name: testUserLoginWithEmail

testcase.name: testUserRegistrationValidationFailure
testcase.system-out: Hibernate: select u1_0.user_id, u1_0.address, u1_0.city, u1_0.company, u1_0.country, u1_0.created_at, u1_0.email, u1_0.name, u1_0.password, u1_0.phone, u1_0.pincode, u1_0.profile_photo, u1_0.updated_at, u1_0.username, u1_0.website from users u1_0 2025-09-16T10:22:44.651+07:00 DEBUG 50141 --- [ main] o.s.security.web.FilterChainProxy : Securing POST /api/auth/register 2025-09-16T10:22:44.652+07:00 DEBUG 50141 --- [ main] o.s.s.w.a.AnonymousAuthenticationFilter : Set SecurityContextHolder to anonymous SecurityContext 2025-09-16T10:22:44.652+07:00 DEBUG 50141 --- [ main] o.s.security.web.FilterChainProxy : Secured POST /api/auth/register 2025-09-16T10:22:44.652+07:00 DEBUG 50141 --- [ main] s.w.s.m.m.a.RequestMappingHandlerMapping : Mapped to com.concert.controller.AuthController#register(RegisterRequest) 2025-09-16T10:22:44.652+07:00 DEBUG 50141 --- [ main] m.m.a.RequestResponseBodyMethodProcessor : Read "application/json;charset=UTF-8" to [com.concert.dto.RegisterRequest@2f5823c7] 2025-09-16T10:22:44.653+07:00 WARN 50141 --- [ main] .w.s.m.s.DefaultHandlerExceptionResolver : Resolved [org.springframework.web.bind.MethodArgumentNotValidException: Validation failed for argument [0] in public org.springframework.http.ResponseEntity<com.concert.dto.AuthResponse> com.concert.controller.AuthController.register(com.concert.dto.RegisterRequest) with 4 errors: [Field error in object 'registerRequest' on field 'username': rejected value []; codes [Size.registerRequest.username,Size.username,Size.java.lang.String,Size]; arguments [org.springframework.context.support.DefaultMessageSourceResolvable: codes [registerRequest.username,username]; arguments []; default message [username],50,3]; default message [Username must be between 3 and 50 characters]] [Field error in object 'registerRequest' on field 'email': rejected value [invalid-email]; codes [Email.registerRequest.email,Email.email,Email.java.lang.String,Email]; arguments [org.springframework.context.support.DefaultMessageSourceResolvable: codes [registerRequest.email,email]; arguments []; default message [email],[Ljakarta.validation.constraints.Pattern$Flag;@417a5aab,.*]; default message [Email should be valid]] [Field error in object 'registerRequest' on field 'password': rejected value [123]; codes [Size.registerRequest.password,Size.password,Size.java.lang.String,Size]; arguments [org.springframework.context.support.DefaultMessageSourceResolvable: codes [registerRequest.password,password]; arguments []; default message [password],2147483647,6]; default message [Password must be at least 6 characters]] [Field error in object 'registerRequest' on field 'username': rejected value []; codes [NotBlank.registerRequest.username,NotBlank.username,NotBlank.java.lang.String,NotBlank]; arguments [org.springframework.context.support.DefaultMessageSourceResolvable: codes [registerRequest.username,username]; arguments []; default message [username]]; default message [Username is required]] ]
